name: GrowingIO
description: Chinese product analytics and growth marketing platform focused on event-less code tracking (无埋点).

seo.title: GrowingIO — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: GrowingIO: Chinese product analytics and growth marketing platform focused on event-less code tracking (无埋点).

when_to_use: Code-free event tracking with auto-capture for Chinese apps
Growth marketing analytics for Chinese consumer product
User journey mapping without manual SDK instrumentation
A/B testing integrated with behavioral analytics
Funnel analysis for Chinese e-commerce checkout flow

pros: Strong product analytics and growth tooling
Deep local compliance and data residency
Integrated marketing automation and CDP features
cons: Codeless tracking can create messy event data
English docs and support are limited
Pricing less transparent for foreign buyers
review.verdict: Leading Chinese product analytics with useful codeless capture; mostly irrelevant outside PRC.
review.best_for: Chinese SaaS and consumer products needing local analytics with codeless tracking.
review.not_for: Western teams, global products, or anyone outside China's data compliance regime.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
